macro.hormuz_status: subdued; Israel-Lebanon ceasefire easing the oil bid

Marvell.role: DC custom silicon + optics; contested vs AVGO

Qualcomm.role: edge-AI leader; soft aggregate TAM, mature handset base

AMD.role: DC #2 + edge secondary; share-taker vs NVDA

Lumentum.role: AI optical interconnect + lasers; FY25 $1.65B, FY26 run-rate inflecting to ~$3B (+85% YoY guide); datacom-driven

Coherent.role: datacom optics + lasers + materials; FY25 $5.81B (+23% YoY); broadest optical franchise

Applied Optoelectronics.role: 800G/1.6T transceivers; FY25 $456M (+83% YoY); small, single-customer-sensitive, volatile

IonQ.role: trapped-ion quantum; 2026 guide $225-245M but deeply pre-earnings. fwd_pe=200 is a SENTINEL for 'no real earnings yet' -> premium is almost entirely floating. This is the red-team's exhibit A: a high discovery score that is arithmetic on a tiny base, not substance.

Palantir.role: AI/data-analytics software; FY25 $4.48B (+56%), FY26 guide +61%. Real gov+commercial moat (AIP), but fwd_pe ~95 = premium largely floating; durable demand but rich multiple is the fragility.

AppLovin.role: ad-tech / AXON engine; FY25 $5.48B (+70%). Cheaper multiple but beta 2.37 (deepest falls) and ad spend is DISCRETIONARY (freezes in a credit crash) -> low capex_elastic, weak recovery floor.

Meta.role: digital advertising + AI; fwd_pe 18 is modest for the growth, so little floating premium; durable earnings, strong moat.

Microsoft.role: cloud + enterprise software + AI; lowest beta of the set, sticky inelastic enterprise demand -> the strongest recovery floor.

Amazon.role: retail + AWS cloud + ads; fwd_pe 29 mostly justified by AWS runway; durable, diversified, defensible.

Apple.role: devices + services; LTM ~$451B, low-single-digit growth; sticky ecosystem, durable earnings — safe but slow.

Alphabet.role: search/ads + Google Cloud + AI; ~12% growth, dominant ads moat.

Oracle.role: enterprise DB + OCI cloud; FY25 $57B, OCI re-accelerating growth.

Texas Instruments.role: analog/embedded; LTM $18.4B (+15% YoY), industrial+DC led; rich multiple for the growth.

Cisco.role: networking + security; ~$56B, low growth, cheap multiple, durable.

IBM.role: hybrid cloud + consulting + AI; ~$64B, slow growth, low beta.

Astera Labs.role: AI connectivity (retimers/CXL); FY25 ~$0.72B (+115% YoY); very high beta, rich multiple — high growth, fragile.

Vertiv.role: AI data-center power & cooling; ~$9B, ~28% growth; physical infra picks-and-shovels.

CoreWeave.role: AI GPU cloud; FY25 $5.1B (from $1.9B), explosive but debt-heavy, barely profitable, very high beta. fwd_pe=120 ~ sentinel; premium largely floating — the high-growth/high-fragility archetype.

ARKK (ARK Innovation).role: disruptive-innovation basket; high beta, rich multiples, concentrated in early/unprofitable growth — high growth, fragile.

QQQ (Nasdaq-100).role: Nasdaq-100 mega-cap tech; quality, but rich and tech-tilted.

VOO (S&P 500).role: broad US large-cap; the market itself — durable, diversified.

SCHD (Dividend).role: quality-dividend value basket; low beta, cheap, durable earnings.

SMH (VanEck Semis).role: ETF (holdings-weighted): 7 priceable constituents = 45% of fund weight

SOXX (iShares Semis).role: ETF (holdings-weighted): 7 priceable constituents = 46% of fund weight

DRAM (Roundhill Memory).role: ETF (holdings-weighted): 1 priceable constituents = 24% of fund weight

QTUM (Defiance Quantum).role: ETF (holdings-weighted): 8 priceable constituents = 16% of fund weight

AIQ (Global X AI).role: ETF (holdings-weighted): 8 priceable constituents = 31% of fund weight

CHAT (Roundhill GenAI).role: ETF (holdings-weighted): 9 priceable constituents = 40% of fund weight
